extraction.one_line_summary: LANDA Mikel escaped late after DUMOULIN Tom was dropped on a mid-race descent where Movistar attacked, winning by 8:10 over the Dutchman.
tactical_patterns: Movistar attacked DUMOULIN Tom on descent when spotting him out of position, exploiting his inferior descending skills mid-stage
GESCHKE Simon paced DUMOULIN Tom back to group after descent attack, depleting Sunweb domestique support with 30-40km remaining
ZAKARIN Ilnur attacked with NIBALI Vincenzo in final 2.4km, cracking QUINTANA Nairo who required ARU tow to rejoin
LANDA Mikel benefited from early breakaway containment then attacked solo when GC riders marked each other on final climb

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: exposed as vulnerable descender when caught out of position, lost maglia rosa despite strong chase effort
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: cracked when ZAKARIN attacked with 2.4km left, needed ARU's wheel to barely limit losses
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: secured mountains jersey then won stage by 8+ minutes, shows he peaks better when pressure removed
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: aggressive repeated attacks in final 3km dropped QUINTANA, moved into podium contention
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: positive: sacrificed stage ambitions to pace DUMOULIN back after Movistar descent attack, crucial domestique work
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: followed ZAKARIN's winning move in final kilometers, distanced QUINTANA for time gains
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: present in chase group after descent crisis but marked others' attacks rather than initiating
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: contributed work to chase DUMOULIN back after descent split alongside Movistar riders
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: animated finale with late attacks, commentary noted him as podium threat for final stage
